23.reason: [Incorrect input loop: does not check for newline termination as per problem spec]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 0.25 , reason:  [Incorrect input loop: does not check for newline termination as per problem spec]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 0.25 , reason:  [Reading second polynomial may not stop at newline; uses EOF instead of checking for '\n']
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 0.2 , reason:  [This loop does not check for newline termination as per input specification; it reads until EOF which may not match the expected input format of two lines]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-4: 0.2 , reason:  [This loop does not check for newline termination; it reads until EOF, which doesn't match the input format that ends with a newline. This leads to incorrect parsing of the second polynomial.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-5: 0.25 , reason:  [Incorrect input termination condition; second polynomial input may not end with EOF but with newline, causing infinite loop or incorrect read]

31.reason: [Potential integer overflow and uses huge global array inefficiently]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 0.25 , reason:  [Potential integer overflow in multiplication and accumulation]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 0.2 , reason:  [Potential integer overflow since multiplication of two ints may exceed int range, and result stored in int array]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-4: 0.2 , reason:  [If the exponent sum 'n' exceeds the bounds of the 'nums' array (which is already dangerously large), it causes undefined behavior. Also, using 'int' for coefficients may overflow during multiplication or accumulation.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-5: 0.25 , reason:  [Potential integer overflow in multiplication and accumulation; also nums array access may exceed bounds if exponent sum > 500000000]
